title: Object Detection Path

steps.title: All-Pairs Shortest Path (Floyd-Warshall)
steps.summary: ** All-Pairs Shortest Path (Floyd-Warshall) belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Object Detection. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Object Detection. Start after Shortest Path.
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Look-Ahead
steps.summary: Look-Ahead belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Object Detection. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Object Detection. Compare it with Shortest Path and All-Pairs Shortest Path (Floyd-Warshall). It opens into Look-Ahead & Gradient Centralization and look ahead planning.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Shortest Path
steps.summary: Shortest Path belongs to the Optimization Algorithms area of AI/ML, within Object Detection. It sits inside Optimization Algorithms / Object Detection. Compare it with All-Pairs Shortest Path (Floyd-Warshall) and Look-Ahead. It opens into All-Pairs Shortest Path (Floyd-Warshall) and Stochastic Shortest Path Problems.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
